name: Fraud Detection with RAG Pipelines
desc: Developed a RAG system integrating BERT embeddings with FAISS and Pinecone to detect anomalous transaction patterns across 500K+ daily financial records. Reduced false positive fraud alerts by 24% with domain-specific XGBoost classifiers. Deployed on AWS SageMaker with Docker for real-time inference.

name: Computer Vision for Smart Surveillance
desc: Real-time vision pipeline using YOLO and Detectron2 to detect intrusions, unattended objects, and abnormal activities — improving detection accuracy by 20%. Applied TensorFlow transfer learning on diverse video datasets and integrated multi-camera stream processing with OpenCV. Deployed via Flask APIs with GPU-accelerated Docker containers.

name: AI-Powered Enterprise Knowledge Copilot
desc: Architected multi-tenant GenAI copilot over 2M+ enterprise documents for 5K+ concurrent users; FastAPI on AWS EC2 at sub-150ms latency. Automated Spark/S3 ingestion slashing knowledge base refresh from 8 hours to 20 minutes; LangChain agents cut human lookup time 70%.

name: IoT Predictive Maintenance & Financial Forecasting
desc: Deployed predictive maintenance models on IoT sensor data (PyTorch + Spark Streaming + Kafka) to GCP Vertex AI — reduced equipment downtime 18%. Implemented financial time-series forecasting with ARIMA, Prophet, XGBoost, and LightGBM with TensorRT-optimized sub-50ms predictions.

name: LLM-Sentiment-Analysis
desc: Helps to automate the analysis of customer feedback using Large Language Models.

name: Transfer-Learning
